hero_sub: Groove-first sets from midday into the night — rooftop terraces, garden parties, Sunday sessions, brunch floors, and everything after dark. Currently open for bookings.

socials_desc: My live sets, my day-to-day, and what I get up to in my free time.
booking_p: Day parties, rooftop sessions, garden bars, hotel terraces, Sunday brunch floors, festival day-stages, and sets running on into the night — get in touch below.

about_bio_p1: My journey behind the decks started about a year and a half ago, almost by accident—fueled by curiosity and a deep love for making people move. What began as a bedroom hobby quickly turned into a serious passion. This led me to professional training at the Inted Music School in Madrid to refine my technique and truly understand the crowd from a different perspective.
about_bio_p2: My sweet spot and signature sound lie within House, Techno, and their most vibrant subgenres: from the organic rhythms of Afro House and Latin Afro to the driving grooves of Tech House and Funky House.
about_bio_p3: I love curation and building the energy of a room. That is why I specialize in progressive sets—the kind that start by setting a warm, elegant backdrop for restaurant dinners, lunches, or afternoon sessions (tardeos), and gradually build up to high-energy House beats that get everyone off their seats. I also feel right at home at private events and parties, where connecting with the crowd is everything.
about_bio_p4: What’s next? I am currently exploring new horizons, blending my electronic roots with the crowd-pleasing energy of commercial music to create sets that are even more dynamic, versatile, and ready for any dancefloor. If you are looking for a soundtrack that evolves with your event, let’s connect. See you on the dancefloor!
